economic_notes: Spelqweqs Development Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) generated net income of $1,538,589. Sisk Pipelines (2021) Ltd. (100% owned) generated net income of $726,159. Both entities accounted for using modified equity method. Total earnings from investment in Band business entities: $2,264,748.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued due to Band not completing an assessment of Asset Retirement Obligations under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Consolidated entities include Three Feathers Construction, Canim Lake Treaty and Self-Government, Sisk Pipelines GP Ltd., Spelqweqs Development Corporation, and CMHC Social Housing Program. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Spelqweqs Development Limited Partnership (99.99%) and Sisk Pipelines (2021) Ltd. (100%). Total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($5,041,217) + Province of BC ($2,497,725) + FNHA ($1,397,941) + CMHC ($41,552) = $8,978,435. OSR = $17,972,679 - $8,978,435 = $8,994,244. TCA net book value not extractable from truncated text. Long-term debt is approximate based on partial data visible: All Nations Trust Phase 3 ($446,226) + Phase 1 ($38,219) + RBC loan ($27,044) = $511,489 partial. Crown-Indigenous Relations loan was forgiven during the year.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
